famous quote:
You can't start the next chapter of life if you keep re-reading the last one.
-Michael McMillian
Interview Text:
Will:

(part 9)

Before we signed off he told me he had seen a couple miracles like the ones I had reported in my Ethiopia book. 

He said one time when praying for someone, the person said Will's hand felt like it was on Fire. The person tried to lean away from it. But Will said, don't shy away; it means it's about to work. And the person's pain went away for a while.

Then he recalled the first healing in the Ethiopia book, in which I prayed for a woman and didn't think anything changed, until the middle of the week when I found out she had been healed.

This was similar to a situation in which Will found himself one time. He prayed for a woman's shoulder who came by the nursery where Will volunteered. The woman worked a manual labor job at a grocery store, which probably caused the pain. She had been hurt for several days. He prayed for her and nothing happened right away. But when he saw her on a following Saturday she said, "I forgot to tell you! I went home that night and my shoulder was better!"
Music Video Instructions: Be grateful for God for such beauty in this world.
